provenance.notes: Canonical MoonCat hue names and trait mappings are still not verified. Character-cat hue ranges are community-curated narrative ranges, not official protocol traits.

characterHueRanges.notes: Use character-cat hue ranges only as curated narrative/filter data. Do not treat them as official coat traits.

paleHandling.notes: Pale coat handling is documented as a future method area, not a verified canonical rule.

circularHueDistance.notes: Useful comparison method; canonical hue targets still need sources.

todos: Verify canonical coat hue names and degree values.
Document special non-hue coat categories with sources.
Extract or derive missing character-cat hue ranges only with source references.
